24export const resolve = Effect.fn("SessionTools.resolve")(function* (input: {25  agent: Agent.Info26  model: Provider.Model27  session: Session.Info28  processor: Pick<SessionProcessor.Handle, "message" | "updateToolCall" | "completeToolCall">29  bypassAgentCheck: boolean30  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]31  promptOps: TaskPromptOps32}) {33  using _ = log.time("resolveTools")34  const tools: Record<string, AITool> = {}35  const run = yield* EffectBridge.make()36  const plugin = yield* Plugin.Service37  const permission = yield* Permission.Service38  const registry = yield* ToolRegistry.Service39  const mcp = yield* MCP.Service40  const truncate = yield* Truncate.Service4142  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }

模型发出 tool-call 后，AI SDK event 会被转成 OpenCode LLMEvent.toolCall：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:191-203

packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:191-203 
191    case "tool-call":192      return Effect.sync(() => {193        state.toolNames[event.toolCallId] = event.toolName194        return [195          LLMEvent.toolCall({196            id: event.toolCallId,197            name: event.toolName,198            input: event.input,199            providerExecuted: "providerExecuted" in event ? event.providerExecuted : undefined,200            providerMetadata: providerMetadata(event.providerMetadata),201          }),202        ]203      })

SessionProcessor 收到 tool-call 后创建或更新 ToolPart，状态从 pending 进入 running：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:376-421

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:376-421 
376          case "tool-call": {377            if (ctx.assistantMessage.summary) {378              throw new Error(`Tool call not allowed while generating summary: ${value.name}`)379            }380            const toolCall = yield* ensureToolCall(value)381            const input = toolInput(value.input)382            if (!toolCall.call.inputEnded) {383              // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.384              if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {385                yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Input.Ended, {386                  sessionID: ctx.sessionID,387                  callID: value.id,388                  text: "",389                  timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),390                })391              }392            }393            // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.394            if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {395              yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Called, {396                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,397                callID: value.id,398                tool: value.name,399                input,400                provider: {401                  executed: toolCall.part.metadata?.providerExecuted === true,402                  ...(value.providerMetadata ? { metadata: value.providerMetadata } : {}),403                },404                timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),405              })406            }407            yield* updateToolCall(value.id, (match) => ({408              ...match,409              tool: value.name,410              state:411                match.state.status === "running"412                  ? { ...match.state, input }413                  : {414                      status: "running",415                      input,416                      time: { start: Date.now() },417                    },418              metadata: match.metadata?.providerExecuted419                ? { ...value.providerMetadata, providerExecuted: true }420                : value.providerMetadata,421            }))

6.6 tool result

Section titled “6.6 tool result”

工具执行后的结果也会作为 stream event 回来：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:205-218

packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:205-218 
205    case "tool-result":206      return Effect.sync(() => {207        const name = state.toolNames[event.toolCallId] ?? "unknown"208        delete state.toolNames[event.toolCallId]209        return [210          LLMEvent.toolResult({211            id: event.toolCallId,212            name,213            result: ToolResultValue.make(event.output),214            providerExecuted: "providerExecuted" in event ? event.providerExecuted : undefined,215            providerMetadata: providerMetadata(event.providerMetadata),216          }),217        ]218      })

Processor 把 tool result 标记为 completed：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:169-193

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:169-193 
169      const completeToolCall = Effect.fn("SessionProcessor.completeToolCall")(function* (170        toolCallID: string,171        output: {172          title: string173          metadata: Record<string, any>174          output: string175          attachments?: MessageV2.FilePart[]176        },177      ) {178        const match = yield* readToolCall(toolCallID)179        if (!match || match.part.state.status !== "running") return180        yield* session.updatePart({181          ...match.part,182          state: {183            status: "completed",184            input: match.part.state.input,185            output: output.output,186            metadata: output.metadata,187            title: output.title,188            time: { start: match.part.state.time.start, end: Date.now() },189            attachments: output.attachments,190          },191        })192        yield* settleToolCall(toolCallID)193      })

ToolPart 的状态模型也证明了工具结果会进入 session message part：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:248-320

packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:248-320 
248export const ToolStatePending = Schema.Struct({249  status: Schema.Literal("pending"),250  input: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any),251  raw: Schema.String,252}).annotate({ identifier: "ToolStatePending" })253export type ToolStatePending = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ToolStatePending>>254255export const ToolStateRunning = Schema.Struct({256  status: Schema.Literal("running"),257  input: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any),258  title: Schema.optional(Schema.String),259  metadata: Schema.optional(Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any)),260  time: Schema.Struct({261    start: NonNegativeInt,262  }),263}).annotate({ identifier: "ToolStateRunning" })264export type ToolStateRunning = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ToolStateRunning>>265266export const ToolStateCompleted = Schema.Struct({267  status: Schema.Literal("completed"),268  input: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any),269  output: Schema.String,270  title: Schema.String,271  metadata: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any),272  time: Schema.Struct({273    start: NonNegativeInt,274    end: NonNegativeInt,275    compacted: Schema.optional(NonNegativeInt),276  }),277  attachments: Schema.optional(Schema.Array(FilePart)),278}).annotate({ identifier: "ToolStateCompleted" })279export type ToolStateCompleted = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ToolStateCompleted>>280281function truncateToolOutput(text: string, maxChars?: number) {282  if (!maxChars || text.length <= maxChars) return text283  const omitted = text.length - maxChars284  return `${text.slice(0, maxChars)}\n[Tool output truncated for compaction: omitted ${omitted} chars]`285}286287export const ToolStateError = Schema.Struct({288  status: Schema.Literal("error"),289  input: Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any),290  error: Schema.String,291  metadata: Schema.optional(Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any)),292  time: Schema.Struct({293    start: NonNegativeInt,294    end: NonNegativeInt,295  }),296}).annotate({ identifier: "ToolStateError" })297export type ToolStateError = Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ToolStateError>>298299export const ToolState = Schema.Union([300  ToolStatePending,301  ToolStateRunning,302  ToolStateCompleted,303  ToolStateError,304]).annotate({305  discriminator: "status",306  identifier: "ToolState",307})308export type ToolState = ToolStatePending | ToolStateRunning | ToolStateCompleted | ToolStateError309310export const ToolPart = Schema.Struct({311  ...partBase,312  type: Schema.Literal("tool"),313  callID: Schema.String,314  tool: Schema.String,315  state: ToolState,316  metadata: Schema.optional(Schema.Record(Schema.String, Schema.Any)),317}).annotate({ identifier: "ToolPart" })318export type ToolPart = Omit<Types.DeepMutable<Schema.Schema.Type<typeof ToolPart>>, "state"> & {319  state: ToolState320}

6.7 再次推理

Section titled “6.7 再次推理”

SessionProcessor.process 结束后返回 "continue"、"stop" 或 "compact"：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:844-846

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:844-846 
844          if (ctx.needsCompaction) return "compact"845          if (ctx.blocked || ctx.assistantMessage.error) return "stop"846          return "continue"

runLoop 根据结果决定结束、compact，或者继续下一轮：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1461-1471

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1461-1471 
1461            if (result === "stop") return "break" as const1462            if (result === "compact") {1463              yield* compaction.create({1464                sessionID,1465                agent: lastUser.agent,1466                model: lastUser.model,1467                auto: true,1468                overflow: !handle.message.finish,1469              })1470            }1471            return "continue" as const

如果 outcome 是 continue，while (true) 进入下一轮，这时刚刚写入的 tool parts 已在 message history 中，下一次 MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model) 会把新的历史转成模型上下文。
来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1477、packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1420-1425。

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1477 
1248        while (true) {1249          yield* status.set(sessionID, { type: "busy" })1250          yield* slog.info("loop", { step })12511252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)12551256          if (!lastUser) throw new Error("No user message found in stream. This should never happen.")12571258          const lastAssistantMsg = msgs.findLast(1259            (msg) => msg.info.role === "assistant" && msg.info.id === lastAssistant?.id,1260          )1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.1265          const hasToolCalls =1266            lastAssistantMsg?.parts.some((part) => part.type === "tool" && !part.metadata?.providerExecuted) ?? false12671268          if (1269            lastAssistant?.finish &&1270            !["tool-calls"].includes(lastAssistant.finish) &&1271            !hasToolCalls &&1272            lastUser.id < lastAssistant.id1273          ) {1274            yield* slog.info("exiting loop")1275            break1276          }12771278          step++1279          if (step === 1)1280            yield* title({1281              session,1282              modelID: lastUser.model.modelID,1283              providerID: lastUser.model.providerID,1284              history: msgs,1285            }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))12861287          const model = yield* getModel(lastUser.model.providerID, lastUser.model.modelID, sessionID)1288          const task = tasks.pop()12891290          if (task?.type === "subtask") {1291            yield* handleSubtask({ task, model, lastUser, sessionID, session, msgs })1292            continue1293          }12941295          if (task?.type === "compaction") {1296            const result = yield* compaction.process({1297              messages: msgs,1298              parentID: lastUser.id,1299              sessionID,1300              auto: task.auto,1301              overflow: task.overflow,1302            })1303            if (result === "stop") break1304            continue1305          }13061307          if (1308            lastFinished &&1309            lastFinished.summary !== true &&1310            (yield* compaction.isOverflow({ tokens: lastFinished.tokens, model }))1311          ) {1312            yield* compaction.create({ sessionID, agent: lastUser.agent, model: lastUser.model, auto: true })1313            continue1314          }13151316          const agent = yield* agents.get(lastUser.agent)1317          if (!agent) {1318            const available = (yield* agents.list()).filter((a) => !a.hidden).map((a) => a.name)1319            const hint = available.length ? ` Available agents: ${available.join(", ")}` : ""1320            const error = new NamedError.Unknown({ message: `Agent not found: "${lastUser.agent}".${hint}` })1321            yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, { sessionID, error: error.toObject() })1322            throw error1323          }1324          const maxSteps = agent.steps ?? Infinity1325          const isLastStep = step >= maxSteps1326          msgs = yield* SessionReminders.apply({ messages: msgs, agent, session }).pipe(1327            Effect.provideService(RuntimeFlags.Service, flags),1328            Effect.provideService(AppFileSystem.Service, fsys),1329            Effect.provideService(Session.Service, sessions),1330          )13311332          const msg: MessageV2.Assistant = {1333            id: MessageID.ascending(),1334            parentID: lastUser.id,1335            role: "assistant",1336            mode: agent.name,1337            agent: agent.name,1338            variant: lastUser.model.variant,1339            path: { cwd: ctx.directory, root: ctx.worktree },1340            cost: 0,1341            tokens: { input: 0, output: 0, reasoning: 0, cache: { read: 0, write: 0 } },1342            modelID: model.id,1343            providerID: model.providerID,1344            time: { created: Date.now() },1345            sessionID,1346          }1347          yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)13481349          const finalizeInterruptedAssistant = Effect.gen(function* () {1350            if (msg.time.completed) return1351            msg.error ??= MessageV2.fromError(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"), {1352              providerID: msg.providerID,1353              aborted: true,1354            })1355            msg.time.completed = Date.now()1356            yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)1357          })13581359          const handle = yield* processor1360            .create({1361              assistantMessage: msg,1362              sessionID,1363              model,1364            })1365            .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant))13661367          const outcome: "break" | "continue" = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {1368            const lastUserMsg = msgs.findLast((m) => m.info.role === "user")1369            const bypassAgentCheck = lastUserMsg?.parts.some((p) => p.type === "agent") ?? false1370            const promptOps = yield* ops()13711372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )13871388            if (lastUser.format?.type === "json_schema") {1389              tools["StructuredOutput"] = createStructuredOutputTool({1390                schema: lastUser.format.schema,1391                onSuccess(output) {1392                  structured = output1393                },1394              })1395            }13961397            if (step === 1)1398              yield* summary.summarize({ sessionID, messageID: lastUser.id }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))13991400            if (step > 1 && lastFinished) {1401              for (const m of msgs) {1402                if (m.info.role !== "user" || m.info.id <= lastFinished.id) continue1403                for (const p of m.parts) {1404                  if (p.type !== "text" || p.ignored || p.synthetic) continue1405                  if (!p.text.trim()) continue1406                  p.text = [1407                    "<system-reminder>",1408                    "The user sent the following message:",1409                    p.text,1410                    "",1411                    "Please address this message and continue with your tasks.",1412                    "</system-reminder>",1413                  ].join("\n")1414                }1415              }1416            }14171418            yield* plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.messages.transform", {}, { messages: msgs })14191420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])1426            const system = [...env, ...instructions, ...(skills ? [skills] : [])]1427            const format = lastUser.format ?? { type: "text" as const }1428            if (format.type === "json_schema") system.push(STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })14411442            if (structured !== undefined) {1443              handle.message.structured = structured1444              handle.message.finish = handle.message.finish ?? "stop"1445              yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1446              return "break" as const1447            }14481449            const finished = handle.message.finish && !["tool-calls", "unknown"].includes(handle.message.finish)1450            if (finished && !handle.message.error) {1451              if (format.type === "json_schema") {1452                handle.message.error = new MessageV2.StructuredOutputError({1453                  message: "Model did not produce structured output",1454                  retries: 0,1455                }).toObject()1456                yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1457                return "break" as const1458              }1459            }14601461            if (result === "stop") return "break" as const1462            if (result === "compact") {1463              yield* compaction.create({1464                sessionID,1465                agent: lastUser.agent,1466                model: lastUser.model,1467                auto: true,1468                overflow: !handle.message.finish,1469              })1470            }1471            return "continue" as const1472          }).pipe(1473            Effect.ensuring(instruction.clear(handle.message.id)),1474            Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant),1475          )1476          if (outcome === "break") break1477          continue
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1420-1425 
1420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])

说明：这里“tool parts 会被下一轮模型上下文消费”的结论来自 runLoop 每轮重新读取 MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID) 并调用 MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model)；具体 tool part 到 provider message 的格式转换需要继续阅读 MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect，本章不展开。

6.8 输出结果

Section titled “6.8 输出结果”

如果模型输出普通文本，processor 会创建 text part、追加 delta、结束时更新 part：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:618-685

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:618-685 
618          case "text-start":619            if (!ctx.assistantMessage.summary) {620              // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.621              if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {622                yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Text.Started, {623                  sessionID: ctx.sessionID,624                  timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),625                })626              }627            }628            ctx.currentText = {629              id: PartID.ascending(),630              messageID: ctx.assistantMessage.id,631              sessionID: ctx.assistantMessage.sessionID,632              type: "text",633              text: "",634              time: { start: Date.now() },635              metadata: value.providerMetadata,636            }637            yield* session.updatePart(ctx.currentText)638            return639640          case "text-delta":641            if (!ctx.currentText) return642            ctx.currentText.text += value.text643            if (value.providerMetadata) ctx.currentText.metadata = value.providerMetadata644            yield* session.updatePartDelta({645              sessionID: ctx.currentText.sessionID,646              messageID: ctx.currentText.messageID,647              partID: ctx.currentText.id,648              field: "text",649              delta: value.text,650            })651            return652653          case "text-end":654            if (!ctx.currentText) return655            // oxlint-disable-next-line no-self-assign -- reactivity trigger656            ctx.currentText.text = ctx.currentText.text657            ctx.currentText.text = (yield* plugin.trigger(658              "experimental.text.complete",659              {660                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,661                messageID: ctx.assistantMessage.id,662                partID: ctx.currentText.id,663              },664              { text: ctx.currentText.text },665            )).text666            if (!ctx.assistantMessage.summary) {667              // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.668              if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {669                yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Text.Ended, {670                  sessionID: ctx.sessionID,671                  text: ctx.currentText.text,672                  timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),673                })674              }675            }676            {677              const end = Date.now()678              ctx.currentText.time = { start: ctx.currentText.time?.start ?? end, end }679            }680            if (value.providerMetadata) ctx.currentText.metadata = value.providerMetadata681            yield* session.updatePart(ctx.currentText)682            ctx.currentText = undefined683            return684685          case "finish":

7. 核心源码逐段讲解

Section titled “7. 核心源码逐段讲解”

7.1 prompt：入口不直接问模型

Section titled “7.1 prompt：入口不直接问模型”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1229

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1211-1229 
1211    const prompt: (input: PromptInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Image.Error> = Effect.fn(1212      "SessionPrompt.prompt",1213    )(function* (input: PromptInput) {1214      const session = yield* sessions.get(input.sessionID).pipe(Effect.orDie)1215      yield* revert.cleanup(session)1216      const message = yield* createUserMessage(input)1217      yield* sessions.touch(input.sessionID)12181219      const permissions: Permission.Ruleset = []1220      for (const [t, enabled] of Object.entries(input.tools ?? {})) {1221        permissions.push({ permission: t, action: enabled ? "allow" : "deny", pattern: "*" })1222      }1223      if (permissions.length > 0) {1224        session.permission = permissions1225        yield* sessions.setPermission({ sessionID: session.id, permission: permissions })1226      }12271228      if (input.noReply === true) return message1229      return yield* loop({ sessionID: input.sessionID })

它解决的问题：先把用户输入落到 session，保证后续 loop 只依赖统一的消息历史。

Java 理解：这是 Application Service 的 command handler。先 save(UserMessage)，再调用 agentLoop.run(sessionId)。

复述检查：为什么 OpenCode 不在 CLI handler 里直接调用 LLM？

7.2 loop：同一 session 不能随便并发跑

Section titled “7.2 loop：同一 session 不能随便并发跑”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1485-1489

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1485-1489 
1485    const loop: (input: LoopInput) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts> = Effect.fn("SessionPrompt.loop")(function* (1486      input: LoopInput,1487    ) {1488      return yield* state.ensureRunning(input.sessionID, lastAssistant(input.sessionID), runLoop(input.sessionID))1489    })

它解决的问题：同一个 session 的 agent run 需要 busy/idle/cancel 管理，避免多个 loop 同时写同一组 messages。

ensureRunning 来自 SessionRunState：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/run-state.ts:10-23

packages/opencode/src/session/run-state.ts packages/opencode/src/session/run-state.ts:10-23 
10export interface Interface {11  readonly assertNotBusy: (sessionID: SessionID) => Effect.Effect<void, Session.BusyError>12  readonly cancel: (sessionID: SessionID) => Effect.Effect<void>13  readonly ensureRunning: (14    sessionID: SessionID,15    onInterrupt: Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts>,16    work: Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts>,17  ) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts>18  readonly startShell: (19    sessionID: SessionID,20    onInterrupt: Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts>,21    work: Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts>,22    ready?: Latch.Latch,23  ) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts, Session.BusyError>

Java 理解：类似给 sessionId 加一个 runner/lock，并注册 interrupt fallback。

7.3 runLoop：真正的状态机

Section titled “7.3 runLoop：真正的状态机”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1256

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1256 
1248        while (true) {1249          yield* status.set(sessionID, { type: "busy" })1250          yield* slog.info("loop", { step })12511252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)12551256          if (!lastUser) throw new Error("No user message found in stream. This should never happen.")

它解决的问题：每轮都从持久化消息状态重新恢复上下文，而不是把上下文藏在内存局部变量里。

Java 理解：这是典型状态机，MessageV2.latest 是状态选择器。

7.4 退出条件：不是所有 stop 都能停

Section titled “7.4 退出条件：不是所有 stop 都能停”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1258-1276

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1258-1276 
1258          const lastAssistantMsg = msgs.findLast(1259            (msg) => msg.info.role === "assistant" && msg.info.id === lastAssistant?.id,1260          )1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.1265          const hasToolCalls =1266            lastAssistantMsg?.parts.some((part) => part.type === "tool" && !part.metadata?.providerExecuted) ?? false12671268          if (1269            lastAssistant?.finish &&1270            !["tool-calls"].includes(lastAssistant.finish) &&1271            !hasToolCalls &&1272            lastUser.id < lastAssistant.id1273          ) {1274            yield* slog.info("exiting loop")1275            break1276          }

它解决的问题：有些 provider 可能返回 stop，但 assistant message 里仍有 tool calls。OpenCode 明确注释说这种情况下要继续 loop，让 tool results 能发回模型。
来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1261-1264。

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1261-1264 
1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.

Java 理解：退出条件不能只看一个状态字段，要看是否还有未反馈给模型的工具调用。

7.5 准备 assistant message 和 processor

Section titled “7.5 准备 assistant message 和 processor”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1332-1365

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1332-1365 
1332          const msg: MessageV2.Assistant = {1333            id: MessageID.ascending(),1334            parentID: lastUser.id,1335            role: "assistant",1336            mode: agent.name,1337            agent: agent.name,1338            variant: lastUser.model.variant,1339            path: { cwd: ctx.directory, root: ctx.worktree },1340            cost: 0,1341            tokens: { input: 0, output: 0, reasoning: 0, cache: { read: 0, write: 0 } },1342            modelID: model.id,1343            providerID: model.providerID,1344            time: { created: Date.now() },1345            sessionID,1346          }1347          yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)13481349          const finalizeInterruptedAssistant = Effect.gen(function* () {1350            if (msg.time.completed) return1351            msg.error ??= MessageV2.fromError(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"), {1352              providerID: msg.providerID,1353              aborted: true,1354            })1355            msg.time.completed = Date.now()1356            yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)1357          })13581359          const handle = yield* processor1360            .create({1361              assistantMessage: msg,1362              sessionID,1363              model,1364            })1365            .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant))

它解决的问题：LLM stream 还没开始前，先创建 assistant message 容器。后续 text/tool/reasoning 都作为 parts 挂到这个 assistant message 下。

Java 理解：先创建一个 AssistantMessage aggregate root，processor 后续只更新这个 aggregate 的 children。

7.6 准备工具

Section titled “7.6 准备工具”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1372-1386

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1372-1386 
1372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )

SessionTools.resolve 内部会创建 Tool.Context，其中 ask 会合并 agent permission 和 session permission：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-73

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:42-73 
42  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })

Java 理解：工具执行被一个上下文对象包住，里面有 session、message、permission、metadata callback，类似 Spring Interceptor + Strategy context。

7.7 调 LLM 并消费事件

Section titled “7.7 调 LLM 并消费事件”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:779-795

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:779-795 
779      const process = Effect.fn("SessionProcessor.process")(function* (streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {780        slog.info("process")781        ctx.needsCompaction = false782        ctx.shouldBreak = (yield* config.get()).experimental?.continue_loop_on_deny !== true783784        return yield* Effect.gen(function* () {785          yield* Effect.gen(function* () {786            ctx.currentText = undefined787            ctx.reasoningMap = {}788            yield* status.set(ctx.sessionID, { type: "busy" })789            const stream = llm.stream(streamInput)790791            yield* stream.pipe(792              Stream.tap((event) => handleEvent(event)),793              Stream.takeUntil(() => ctx.needsCompaction),794              Stream.runDrain,795            )

它解决的问题：LLM 输出不是一次性字符串，而是一串事件。processor 逐个消费事件，并更新 session 状态。

Java 理解：像 Flux<LlmEvent> 或 Flow.Publisher<LlmEvent>，每个 event 被 event handler 消费。

7.8 处理 tool-call 和 tool-result

Section titled “7.8 处理 tool-call 和 tool-result”

tool-call：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:376-421

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:376-421 
376          case "tool-call": {377            if (ctx.assistantMessage.summary) {378              throw new Error(`Tool call not allowed while generating summary: ${value.name}`)379            }380            const toolCall = yield* ensureToolCall(value)381            const input = toolInput(value.input)382            if (!toolCall.call.inputEnded) {383              // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.384              if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {385                yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Input.Ended, {386                  sessionID: ctx.sessionID,387                  callID: value.id,388                  text: "",389                  timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),390                })391              }392            }393            // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.394            if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {395              yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Called, {396                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,397                callID: value.id,398                tool: value.name,399                input,400                provider: {401                  executed: toolCall.part.metadata?.providerExecuted === true,402                  ...(value.providerMetadata ? { metadata: value.providerMetadata } : {}),403                },404                timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),405              })406            }407            yield* updateToolCall(value.id, (match) => ({408              ...match,409              tool: value.name,410              state:411                match.state.status === "running"412                  ? { ...match.state, input }413                  : {414                      status: "running",415                      input,416                      time: { start: Date.now() },417                    },418              metadata: match.metadata?.providerExecuted419                ? { ...value.providerMetadata, providerExecuted: true }420                : value.providerMetadata,421            }))

tool-result：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:451-500 
451          case "tool-result": {452            const toolCall = yield* readToolCall(value.id)453            const rawOutput = toolResultOutput(value)454            const normalized = yield* Effect.forEach(rawOutput.attachments ?? [], (attachment) =>455              attachment.mime.startsWith("image/")456                ? image.normalize(attachment).pipe(457                    Effect.catchIf(458                      (error) => error instanceof Image.ResizerUnavailableError,459                      () => Effect.succeed(attachment),460                    ),461                    Effect.exit,462                  )463                : Effect.succeed(Exit.succeed<MessageV2.FilePart>(attachment)),464            )465            const omitted = normalized.filter(Exit.isFailure).length466            const attachments = normalized.filter(Exit.isSuccess).map((item) => item.value)467            const output = {468              ...rawOutput,469              output:470                omitted === 0471                  ? rawOutput.output472                  : `${rawOutput.output}\n\n[${omitted} image${omitted === 1 ? "" : "s"} omitted: could not be resized below the image size limit.]`,473              attachments: attachments.length ? attachments : undefined,474            }475            // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.476            if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {477              yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Tool.Success, {478                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,479                callID: value.id,480                structured: output.metadata,481                content: [482                  {483                    type: "text",484                    text: output.output,485                  },486                  ...(output.attachments?.map((item: MessageV2.FilePart) => ({487                    type: "file" as const,488                    uri: item.url,489                    mime: item.mime,490                    name: item.filename,491                  })) ?? []),492                ],493                provider: {494                  executed: value.providerExecuted === true || toolCall?.part.metadata?.providerExecuted === true,495                },496                timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),497              })498            }499            yield* completeToolCall(value.id, output)500            return

Java 理解：tool call 是任务进入 running；tool result 是任务完成并持久化 result。

7.9 继续、停止、压缩

Section titled “7.9 继续、停止、压缩”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:844-846

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:844-846 
844          if (ctx.needsCompaction) return "compact"845          if (ctx.blocked || ctx.assistantMessage.error) return "stop"846          return "continue"

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1461-1471

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1461-1471 
1461            if (result === "stop") return "break" as const1462            if (result === "compact") {1463              yield* compaction.create({1464                sessionID,1465                agent: lastUser.agent,1466                model: lastUser.model,1467                auto: true,1468                overflow: !handle.message.finish,1469              })1470            }1471            return "continue" as const

Java 理解：processor 返回状态机事件，loop 根据事件跳转到 break/compact/next iteration。

8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习

Section titled “8. 关键 TypeScript 语法复习”

8.1 Effect.gen(function* () { ... })

Section titled “8.1 Effect.gen(function* () { ... })”

例子：

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1240-1243

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1240-1243 
1240    const runLoop: (sessionID: SessionID) => Effect.Effect<MessageV2.WithParts> = Effect.fn("SessionPrompt.run")(1241      function* (sessionID: SessionID) {1242        const ctx = yield* InstanceState.context1243        const slog = elog.with({ sessionID })

理解：这不是普通 generator 用来产出数组，而是 Effect 用 generator 语法把异步、依赖、错误通道写得像同步代码。Java 类比是 Reactor/CompletableFuture 链，但语法更接近同步 Service。

8.2 destructuring

Section titled “8.2 destructuring”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1254

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1254 
1254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)

理解：从返回对象里取字段，并重命名。Java 里通常会写 latest.user()、latest.assistant()。

8.3 literal union

Section titled “8.3 literal union”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:36

packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:36 
36export type Result = "compact" | "stop" | "continue"

理解：比 Java enum 更轻量，运行时就是字符串，编译期限制只能是这三个值。

8.4 Record

Section titled “8.4 Record”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:34

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:34 
34  const tools: Record<string, AITool> = {}

理解：类似 Map<String, AITool>，但这里用 JS object 表示工具名到工具对象的映射。

8.5 object spread

Section titled “8.5 object spread”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:93-102

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:93-102 
93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }

理解：浅拷贝原对象并覆盖/补充字段，类似 Java builder copy。

8.6 discriminated union

Section titled “8.6 discriminated union”

路径：packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:299-308

packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts:299-308 
299export const ToolState = Schema.Union([300  ToolStatePending,301  ToolStateRunning,302  ToolStateCompleted,303  ToolStateError,304]).annotate({305  discriminator: "status",306  identifier: "ToolState",307})308export type ToolState = ToolStatePending | ToolStateRunning | ToolStateCompleted | ToolStateError

理解：status 是判别字段，类似 Java sealed interface + 多个 record 实现。

9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想

Section titled “9. 涉及的设计模式和架构思想”
  1. State Machine
    runLoop 的 while (true) 根据 stop/continue/compact/subtask 切换状态。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1477。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1248-1477 
1248        while (true) {1249          yield* status.set(sessionID, { type: "busy" })1250          yield* slog.info("loop", { step })12511252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)12551256          if (!lastUser) throw new Error("No user message found in stream. This should never happen.")12571258          const lastAssistantMsg = msgs.findLast(1259            (msg) => msg.info.role === "assistant" && msg.info.id === lastAssistant?.id,1260          )1261          // Some providers return "stop" even when the assistant message contains tool calls.1262          // Keep the loop running so tool results can be sent back to the model.1263          // Skip provider-executed tool parts — those were fully handled within the1264          // provider's stream (e.g. DWS Agent Platform) and don't need a re-loop.1265          const hasToolCalls =1266            lastAssistantMsg?.parts.some((part) => part.type === "tool" && !part.metadata?.providerExecuted) ?? false12671268          if (1269            lastAssistant?.finish &&1270            !["tool-calls"].includes(lastAssistant.finish) &&1271            !hasToolCalls &&1272            lastUser.id < lastAssistant.id1273          ) {1274            yield* slog.info("exiting loop")1275            break1276          }12771278          step++1279          if (step === 1)1280            yield* title({1281              session,1282              modelID: lastUser.model.modelID,1283              providerID: lastUser.model.providerID,1284              history: msgs,1285            }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))12861287          const model = yield* getModel(lastUser.model.providerID, lastUser.model.modelID, sessionID)1288          const task = tasks.pop()12891290          if (task?.type === "subtask") {1291            yield* handleSubtask({ task, model, lastUser, sessionID, session, msgs })1292            continue1293          }12941295          if (task?.type === "compaction") {1296            const result = yield* compaction.process({1297              messages: msgs,1298              parentID: lastUser.id,1299              sessionID,1300              auto: task.auto,1301              overflow: task.overflow,1302            })1303            if (result === "stop") break1304            continue1305          }13061307          if (1308            lastFinished &&1309            lastFinished.summary !== true &&1310            (yield* compaction.isOverflow({ tokens: lastFinished.tokens, model }))1311          ) {1312            yield* compaction.create({ sessionID, agent: lastUser.agent, model: lastUser.model, auto: true })1313            continue1314          }13151316          const agent = yield* agents.get(lastUser.agent)1317          if (!agent) {1318            const available = (yield* agents.list()).filter((a) => !a.hidden).map((a) => a.name)1319            const hint = available.length ? ` Available agents: ${available.join(", ")}` : ""1320            const error = new NamedError.Unknown({ message: `Agent not found: "${lastUser.agent}".${hint}` })1321            yield* bus.publish(Session.Event.Error, { sessionID, error: error.toObject() })1322            throw error1323          }1324          const maxSteps = agent.steps ?? Infinity1325          const isLastStep = step >= maxSteps1326          msgs = yield* SessionReminders.apply({ messages: msgs, agent, session }).pipe(1327            Effect.provideService(RuntimeFlags.Service, flags),1328            Effect.provideService(AppFileSystem.Service, fsys),1329            Effect.provideService(Session.Service, sessions),1330          )13311332          const msg: MessageV2.Assistant = {1333            id: MessageID.ascending(),1334            parentID: lastUser.id,1335            role: "assistant",1336            mode: agent.name,1337            agent: agent.name,1338            variant: lastUser.model.variant,1339            path: { cwd: ctx.directory, root: ctx.worktree },1340            cost: 0,1341            tokens: { input: 0, output: 0, reasoning: 0, cache: { read: 0, write: 0 } },1342            modelID: model.id,1343            providerID: model.providerID,1344            time: { created: Date.now() },1345            sessionID,1346          }1347          yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)13481349          const finalizeInterruptedAssistant = Effect.gen(function* () {1350            if (msg.time.completed) return1351            msg.error ??= MessageV2.fromError(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"), {1352              providerID: msg.providerID,1353              aborted: true,1354            })1355            msg.time.completed = Date.now()1356            yield* sessions.updateMessage(msg)1357          })13581359          const handle = yield* processor1360            .create({1361              assistantMessage: msg,1362              sessionID,1363              model,1364            })1365            .pipe(Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant))13661367          const outcome: "break" | "continue" = yield* Effect.gen(function* () {1368            const lastUserMsg = msgs.findLast((m) => m.info.role === "user")1369            const bypassAgentCheck = lastUserMsg?.parts.some((p) => p.type === "agent") ?? false1370            const promptOps = yield* ops()13711372            const tools = yield* SessionTools.resolve({1373              agent,1374              session,1375              model,1376              processor: handle,1377              bypassAgentCheck,1378              messages: msgs,1379              promptOps,1380            }).pipe(1381              Effect.provideService(Plugin.Service, plugin),1382              Effect.provideService(Permission.Service, permission),1383              Effect.provideService(ToolRegistry.Service, registry),1384              Effect.provideService(MCP.Service, mcp),1385              Effect.provideService(Truncate.Service, truncate),1386            )13871388            if (lastUser.format?.type === "json_schema") {1389              tools["StructuredOutput"] = createStructuredOutputTool({1390                schema: lastUser.format.schema,1391                onSuccess(output) {1392                  structured = output1393                },1394              })1395            }13961397            if (step === 1)1398              yield* summary.summarize({ sessionID, messageID: lastUser.id }).pipe(Effect.ignore, Effect.forkIn(scope))13991400            if (step > 1 && lastFinished) {1401              for (const m of msgs) {1402                if (m.info.role !== "user" || m.info.id <= lastFinished.id) continue1403                for (const p of m.parts) {1404                  if (p.type !== "text" || p.ignored || p.synthetic) continue1405                  if (!p.text.trim()) continue1406                  p.text = [1407                    "<system-reminder>",1408                    "The user sent the following message:",1409                    p.text,1410                    "",1411                    "Please address this message and continue with your tasks.",1412                    "</system-reminder>",1413                  ].join("\n")1414                }1415              }1416            }14171418            yield* plugin.trigger("experimental.chat.messages.transform", {}, { messages: msgs })14191420            const [skills, env, instructions, modelMsgs] = yield* Effect.all([1421              sys.skills(agent),1422              sys.environment(model),1423              instruction.system().pipe(Effect.orDie),1424              MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect(msgs, model),1425            ])1426            const system = [...env, ...instructions, ...(skills ? [skills] : [])]1427            const format = lastUser.format ?? { type: "text" as const }1428            if (format.type === "json_schema") system.push(STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SYSTEM_PROMPT)1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })14411442            if (structured !== undefined) {1443              handle.message.structured = structured1444              handle.message.finish = handle.message.finish ?? "stop"1445              yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1446              return "break" as const1447            }14481449            const finished = handle.message.finish && !["tool-calls", "unknown"].includes(handle.message.finish)1450            if (finished && !handle.message.error) {1451              if (format.type === "json_schema") {1452                handle.message.error = new MessageV2.StructuredOutputError({1453                  message: "Model did not produce structured output",1454                  retries: 0,1455                }).toObject()1456                yield* sessions.updateMessage(handle.message)1457                return "break" as const1458              }1459            }14601461            if (result === "stop") return "break" as const1462            if (result === "compact") {1463              yield* compaction.create({1464                sessionID,1465                agent: lastUser.agent,1466                model: lastUser.model,1467                auto: true,1468                overflow: !handle.message.finish,1469              })1470            }1471            return "continue" as const1472          }).pipe(1473            Effect.ensuring(instruction.clear(handle.message.id)),1474            Effect.onInterrupt(() => finalizeInterruptedAssistant),1475          )1476          if (outcome === "break") break1477          continue

  1. Application Service / Orchestrator
    SessionPrompt 不做具体 tool 实现，但协调 session、agent、provider、processor、tools。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts。

  2. Strategy / Registry
    工具由 registry 解析，具体工具实现由 item.execute 执行。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:75-116。

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:75-116 
75  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }
  1. Gateway / Adapter
    LLM.stream 隐藏 AI SDK/native runtime 差异。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:471-493。
packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:471-493 
471    const stream: Interface["stream"] = (input) =>472      Stream.scoped(473        Stream.unwrap(474          Effect.gen(function* () {475            const ctrl = yield* Effect.acquireRelease(476              Effect.sync(() => new AbortController()),477              (ctrl) => Effect.sync(() => ctrl.abort()),478            )479480            const result = yield* run({ ...input, abort: ctrl.signal })481482            if (result.type === "native") return result.stream483484            const state = LLMAISDK.adapterState()485            return Stream.fromAsyncIterable(result.result.fullStream, (e) =>486              e instanceof Error ? e : new Error(String(e)),487            ).pipe(488              Stream.mapEffect((event) => LLMAISDK.toLLMEvents(state, event)),489              Stream.flatMap((events) => Stream.fromIterable(events)),490            )491          }),492        ),493      )
  1. Event Processor
    SessionProcessor 消费 LLMEvent 并更新消息 parts。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:779-847。
packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:779-847 
779      const process = Effect.fn("SessionProcessor.process")(function* (streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {780        slog.info("process")781        ctx.needsCompaction = false782        ctx.shouldBreak = (yield* config.get()).experimental?.continue_loop_on_deny !== true783784        return yield* Effect.gen(function* () {785          yield* Effect.gen(function* () {786            ctx.currentText = undefined787            ctx.reasoningMap = {}788            yield* status.set(ctx.sessionID, { type: "busy" })789            const stream = llm.stream(streamInput)790791            yield* stream.pipe(792              Stream.tap((event) => handleEvent(event)),793              Stream.takeUntil(() => ctx.needsCompaction),794              Stream.runDrain,795            )796          }).pipe(797            Effect.onInterrupt(() =>798              Effect.gen(function* () {799                aborted = true800                if (!ctx.assistantMessage.error) {801                  yield* halt(new DOMException("Aborted", "AbortError"))802                }803              }),804            ),805            Effect.catchCauseIf(806              (cause) => !Cause.hasInterruptsOnly(cause),807              (cause) => Effect.fail(Cause.squash(cause)),808            ),809            Effect.retry(810              SessionRetry.policy({811                provider: input.model.providerID,812                parse,813                set: (info) => {814                  // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.815                  const event = flags.experimentalEventSystem816                    ? events.publish(SessionEvent.Retried, {817                        sessionID: ctx.sessionID,818                        attempt: info.attempt,819                        error: {820                          message: info.message,821                          isRetryable: true,822                        },823                        timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),824                      })825                    : Effect.void826                  return event.pipe(827                    Effect.andThen(828                      status.set(ctx.sessionID, {829                        type: "retry",830                        attempt: info.attempt,831                        message: info.message,832                        action: info.action,833                        next: info.next,834                      }),835                    ),836                  )837                },838              }),839            ),840            Effect.catch(halt),841            Effect.ensuring(cleanup()),842          )843844          if (ctx.needsCompaction) return "compact"845          if (ctx.blocked || ctx.assistantMessage.error) return "stop"846          return "continue"847        })
  1. Policy / Interceptor
    SessionTools.resolve 里的 ctx.ask 把权限检查插入工具执行上下文。来源：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:64-72。
packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:64-72 
64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),

10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作

Section titled “10. 它如何和 Tool、Provider、Session、文件系统协作”

Session

Section titled “Session”

Session 是 loop 的状态仓库。prompt 写入 user message；runLoop 每轮读取 messages；processor 写入 assistant text/tool parts。
来源：packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1117、packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1252-1254、packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:618-685。

packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1116-1117 
1116      yield* sessions.updateMessage(info)1117      for (const part of parts) yield* sessions.updatePart(part)
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1252-1254 
1252          let msgs = yield* MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect(sessionID)12531254          const { user: lastUser, assistant: lastAssistant, finished: lastFinished, tasks } = MessageV2.latest(msgs)
packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:618-685 
618          case "text-start":619            if (!ctx.assistantMessage.summary) {620              // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.621              if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {622                yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Text.Started, {623                  sessionID: ctx.sessionID,624                  timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),625                })626              }627            }628            ctx.currentText = {629              id: PartID.ascending(),630              messageID: ctx.assistantMessage.id,631              sessionID: ctx.assistantMessage.sessionID,632              type: "text",633              text: "",634              time: { start: Date.now() },635              metadata: value.providerMetadata,636            }637            yield* session.updatePart(ctx.currentText)638            return639640          case "text-delta":641            if (!ctx.currentText) return642            ctx.currentText.text += value.text643            if (value.providerMetadata) ctx.currentText.metadata = value.providerMetadata644            yield* session.updatePartDelta({645              sessionID: ctx.currentText.sessionID,646              messageID: ctx.currentText.messageID,647              partID: ctx.currentText.id,648              field: "text",649              delta: value.text,650            })651            return652653          case "text-end":654            if (!ctx.currentText) return655            // oxlint-disable-next-line no-self-assign -- reactivity trigger656            ctx.currentText.text = ctx.currentText.text657            ctx.currentText.text = (yield* plugin.trigger(658              "experimental.text.complete",659              {660                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,661                messageID: ctx.assistantMessage.id,662                partID: ctx.currentText.id,663              },664              { text: ctx.currentText.text },665            )).text666            if (!ctx.assistantMessage.summary) {667              // TODO(v2): Temporary dual-write while migrating session messages to v2 events.668              if (flags.experimentalEventSystem) {669                yield* events.publish(SessionEvent.Text.Ended, {670                  sessionID: ctx.sessionID,671                  text: ctx.currentText.text,672                  timestamp: DateTime.makeUnsafe(Date.now()),673                })674              }675            }676            {677              const end = Date.now()678              ctx.currentText.time = { start: ctx.currentText.time?.start ?? end, end }679            }680            if (value.providerMetadata) ctx.currentText.metadata = value.providerMetadata681            yield* session.updatePart(ctx.currentText)682            ctx.currentText = undefined683            return684685          case "finish":

Tool

Section titled “Tool”

SessionTools.resolve 根据 agent/model/session 解析工具，并给每个工具提供 ctx.metadata 和 ctx.ask。工具执行结果通过 processor 的 completeToolCall 写回 tool part。
来源：packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:24-116、packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:169-193。

packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts packages/opencode/src/session/tools.ts:24-116 
24export const resolve = Effect.fn("SessionTools.resolve")(function* (input: {25  agent: Agent.Info26  model: Provider.Model27  session: Session.Info28  processor: Pick<SessionProcessor.Handle, "message" | "updateToolCall" | "completeToolCall">29  bypassAgentCheck: boolean30  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]31  promptOps: TaskPromptOps32}) {33  using _ = log.time("resolveTools")34  const tools: Record<string, AITool> = {}35  const run = yield* EffectBridge.make()36  const plugin = yield* Plugin.Service37  const permission = yield* Permission.Service38  const registry = yield* ToolRegistry.Service39  const mcp = yield* MCP.Service40  const truncate = yield* Truncate.Service4142  const context = (args: Record<string, unknown>, options: ToolExecutionOptions): Tool.Context => ({43    sessionID: input.session.id,44    abort: options.abortSignal!,45    messageID: input.processor.message.id,46    callID: options.toolCallId,47    extra: { model: input.model, bypassAgentCheck: input.bypassAgentCheck, promptOps: input.promptOps },48    agent: input.agent.name,49    messages: input.messages,50    metadata: (val) =>51      input.processor.updateToolCall(options.toolCallId, (match) => {52        if (!["running", "pending"].includes(match.state.status)) return match53        return {54          ...match,55          state: {56            title: val.title,57            metadata: val.metadata,58            status: "running",59            input: args,60            time: { start: Date.now() },61          },62        }63      }),64    ask: (req) =>65      permission66        .ask({67          ...req,68          sessionID: input.session.id,69          tool: { messageID: input.processor.message.id, callID: options.toolCallId },70          ruleset: Permission.merge(input.agent.permission, input.session.permission ?? []),71        })72        .pipe(Effect.orDie),73  })7475  for (const item of yield* registry.tools({76    modelID: ModelID.make(input.model.api.id),77    providerID: input.model.providerID,78    agent: input.agent,79  })) {80    const schema = ProviderTransform.schema(input.model, ToolJsonSchema.fromTool(item))81    tools[item.id] = tool({82      description: item.description,83      inputSchema: jsonSchema(schema),84      execute(args, options) {85        return run.promise(86          Effect.gen(function* () {87            const ctx = context(args, options)88            yield* plugin.trigger(89              "tool.execute.before",90              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID },91              { args },92            )93            const result = yield* item.execute(args, ctx)94            const output = {95              ...result,96              attachments: result.attachments?.map((attachment) => ({97                ...attachment,98                id: PartID.ascending(),99                sessionID: ctx.sessionID,100                messageID: input.processor.message.id,101              })),102            }103            yield* plugin.trigger(104              "tool.execute.after",105              { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },106              output,107            )108            if (options.abortSignal?.aborted) {109              yield* input.processor.completeToolCall(options.toolCallId, output)110            }111            return output112          }),113        )114      },115    })116  }
packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:169-193 
169      const completeToolCall = Effect.fn("SessionProcessor.completeToolCall")(function* (170        toolCallID: string,171        output: {172          title: string173          metadata: Record<string, any>174          output: string175          attachments?: MessageV2.FilePart[]176        },177      ) {178        const match = yield* readToolCall(toolCallID)179        if (!match || match.part.state.status !== "running") return180        yield* session.updatePart({181          ...match.part,182          state: {183            status: "completed",184            input: match.part.state.input,185            output: output.output,186            metadata: output.metadata,187            title: output.title,188            time: { start: match.part.state.time.start, end: Date.now() },189            attachments: output.attachments,190          },191        })192        yield* settleToolCall(toolCallID)193      })

Provider / LLM

Section titled “Provider / LLM”

LLM.StreamInput 包含 model、agent、system、messages、tools；LLM.stream 使用 streamText 发送请求，并把 AI SDK fullStream 变成统一事件。
来源：packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60、packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:402-493。

packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:39-60 
39export type StreamInput = {40  user: MessageV2.User41  sessionID: string42  parentSessionID?: string43  model: Provider.Model44  agent: Agent.Info45  permission?: Permission.Ruleset46  system: string[]47  messages: ModelMessage[]48  small?: boolean49  tools: Record<string, Tool>50  retries?: number51  toolChoice?: "auto" | "required" | "none"52}5354export type StreamRequest = StreamInput & {55  abort: AbortSignal56}5758export interface Interface {59  readonly stream: (input: StreamInput) => Stream.Stream<LLMEvent, unknown>60}
packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm.ts:402-493 
402      return {403        type: "ai-sdk" as const,404        result: streamText({405          onError(error) {406            l.error("stream error", {407              error,408            })409          },410          async experimental_repairToolCall(failed) {411            const lower = failed.toolCall.toolName.toLowerCase()412            if (lower !== failed.toolCall.toolName && sortedTools[lower]) {413              l.info("repairing tool call", {414                tool: failed.toolCall.toolName,415                repaired: lower,416              })417              return {418                ...failed.toolCall,419                toolName: lower,420              }421            }422            return {423              ...failed.toolCall,424              input: JSON.stringify({425                tool: failed.toolCall.toolName,426                error: failed.error.message,427              }),428              toolName: "invalid",429            }430          },431          temperature: params.temperature,432          topP: params.topP,433          topK: params.topK,434          providerOptions: ProviderTransform.providerOptions(input.model, params.options),435          activeTools: Object.keys(sortedTools).filter((x) => x !== "invalid"),436          tools: sortedTools,437          toolChoice: input.toolChoice,438          maxOutputTokens: params.maxOutputTokens,439          abortSignal: input.abort,440          headers: requestHeaders,441          maxRetries: input.retries ?? 0,442          messages,443          model: wrapLanguageModel({444            model: language,445            middleware: [446              {447                specificationVersion: "v3" as const,448                async transformParams(args) {449                  if (args.type === "stream") {450                    // @ts-expect-error451                    args.params.prompt = ProviderTransform.message(args.params.prompt, input.model, options)452                  }453                  return args.params454                },455              },456            ],457          }),458          experimental_telemetry: {459            isEnabled: cfg.experimental?.openTelemetry,460            functionId: "session.llm",461            tracer: telemetryTracer,462            metadata: {463              userId: cfg.username ?? "unknown",464              sessionId: input.sessionID,465            },466          },467        }),468      }469    })470471    const stream: Interface["stream"] = (input) =>472      Stream.scoped(473        Stream.unwrap(474          Effect.gen(function* () {475            const ctrl = yield* Effect.acquireRelease(476              Effect.sync(() => new AbortController()),477              (ctrl) => Effect.sync(() => ctrl.abort()),478            )479480            const result = yield* run({ ...input, abort: ctrl.signal })481482            if (result.type === "native") return result.stream483484            const state = LLMAISDK.adapterState()485            return Stream.fromAsyncIterable(result.result.fullStream, (e) =>486              e instanceof Error ? e : new Error(String(e)),487            ).pipe(488              Stream.mapEffect((event) => LLMAISDK.toLLMEvents(state, event)),489              Stream.flatMap((events) => Stream.fromIterable(events)),490            )491          }),492        ),493      )

文件系统

Section titled “文件系统”

Agent 核心循环本身不直接写文件。它通过 tools 间接调用文件系统，比如 edit/write/read/shell。样章只验证了 loop 到 tool 的通道；具体文件读写请继续读 packages/opencode/src/tool/read.ts、edit.ts、write.ts。
不确定点：本章没有展开 MessageV2.toModelMessagesEffect 如何把文件/tool parts 转成 provider message，需要在后续 “Tool 调用系统” 或 “文件读写与代码修改” 章节补充。

11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码

Section titled “11. 如果自己实现 mini agent，这一章对应什么代码”

最小实现可以这样拆：

对照 OpenCode：

  • sessionStore.loadMessages 对应 MessageV2.filterCompactedEffect。
  • findLatestUser 对应 MessageV2.latest。
  • toolRegistry.resolve 对应 SessionTools.resolve。
  • llm.stream 对应 LLM.stream。
  • processor.apply 对应 SessionProcessor.process / handleEvent。

先不要实现 LSP、compaction、subtask、plugin。先把 user -> llm -> tool -> result -> next loop 跑通。

12. 费曼复述区

Section titled “12. 费曼复述区”

12.1 请你用自己的话解释

Section titled “12.1 请你用自己的话解释”

用 3 句话解释：

  1. SessionPrompt.prompt 做了什么？
  2. runLoop 为什么要 while？
  3. tool result 是如何让模型继续推理的？

12.2 如果解释不出来，说明卡在这里

Section titled “12.2 如果解释不出来，说明卡在这里”

常见卡点：

  • 把 CLI handler 当成真正 agent runtime。
  • 以为模型一次返回最终答案，不理解 tool call 会触发下一轮。
  • 分不清 SessionTools.resolve 和具体 tool execute。
  • 分不清 LLM.stream 和 SessionProcessor.process。

12.3 换一种说法再解释

Section titled “12.3 换一种说法再解释”

OpenCode 的 agent loop 就像一个“带工具的消息驱动工作流”：

  • session 保存事实。
  • loop 选择下一步。
  • LLM 产生行动建议。
  • tool 执行动作。
  • processor 把动作结果写回事实。
  • loop 再读事实继续判断。

13. 练习题

Section titled “13. 练习题”

入门题

Section titled “入门题”
  1. 找到 SessionPrompt.prompt，写出它调用的三个关键动作。
  2. 找到 MessageV2.latest，说明它为什么按 message id 判断最新消息。
  3. 找到 SessionProcessor.process，说明它返回哪三种结果。

进阶题

Section titled “进阶题”
  1. 解释为什么 lastAssistant.finish 存在时，OpenCode 仍然可能继续 loop。
  2. 解释 SessionTools.resolve 为什么需要 processor。
  3. 解释 ToolStatePending -> Running -> Completed/Error 对 UI 有什么价值。

小实现题

Section titled “小实现题”

用 TypeScript 写一个最小内存版 agent loop：

  • messages 存在数组里。
  • tool 只有 echo。
  • 假 LLM 第一次返回 tool-call，第二次返回 text。
  • loop 能执行 echo tool，并把结果喂给第二轮。

14. 源码追踪任务

Section titled “14. 源码追踪任务”
  1. 从 packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:791-798 追到 SessionPrompt.prompt。
packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts:791-798 
791          const model = pick(args.model)792          const result = await client.session.prompt({793            sessionID,794            agent,795            model,796            variant: args.variant,797            parts: [...files, { type: "text", text: message }],798          })
  1. 从 packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1429-1440 追到 SessionProcessor.process。
packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts:1429-1440 
1429            const result = yield* handle.process({1430              user: lastUser,1431              agent,1432              permission: session.permission,1433              sessionID,1434              parentSessionID: session.parentID,1435              system,1436              messages: [...modelMsgs, ...(isLastStep ? [{ role: "assistant" as const, content: MAX_STEPS }] : [])],1437              tools,1438              model,1439              toolChoice: format.type === "json_schema" ? "required" : undefined,1440            })
  1. 从 packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:789-795 追到 LLM.stream。
packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts packages/opencode/src/session/processor.ts:789-795 
789            const stream = llm.stream(streamInput)790791            yield* stream.pipe(792              Stream.tap((event) => handleEvent(event)),793              Stream.takeUntil(() => ctx.needsCompaction),794              Stream.runDrain,795            )
  1. 从 packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:191-218 追到 SessionProcessor 的 tool-call / tool-result case。
packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts packages/opencode/src/session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:191-218 
191    case "tool-call":192      return Effect.sync(() => {193        state.toolNames[event.toolCallId] = event.toolName194        return [195          LLMEvent.toolCall({196            id: event.toolCallId,197            name: event.toolName,198            input: event.input,199            providerExecuted: "providerExecuted" in event ? event.providerExecuted : undefined,200            providerMetadata: providerMetadata(event.providerMetadata),201          }),202        ]203      })204205    case "tool-result":206      return Effect.sync(() => {207        const name = state.toolNames[event.toolCallId] ?? "unknown"208        delete state.toolNames[event.toolCallId]209        return [210          LLMEvent.toolResult({211            id: event.toolCallId,212            name,213            result: ToolResultValue.make(event.output),214            providerExecuted: "providerExecuted" in event ? event.providerExecuted : undefined,215            providerMetadata: providerMetadata(event.providerMetadata),216          }),217        ]218      })
  1. 从 SessionTools.resolve 追一个具体工具，例如 read 或 edit。

15. 面试式自测

Section titled “15. 面试式自测”
  1. OpenCode 的 agent loop 和普通 chat completion 最大区别是什么？
  2. 为什么 agent loop 需要持久化 message parts？
  3. SessionProcessor 为什么不直接返回字符串？
  4. OpenCode 如何处理模型返回了 tool call 的情况？
  5. 什么情况下 loop 会返回 compact？
  6. 为什么 tool 执行上下文里要有 ask？
  7. 如果你要避免同一 session 并发跑两个 loop，你会怎么设计？
  8. 如果模型不停调用同一个工具，OpenCode 有哪些防护迹象？提示：看 doom_loop。

16. 下一步阅读建议

Section titled “16. 下一步阅读建议”

建议下一章生成 “Tool 调用系统”。理由：Agent 核心循环里最难理解的下一跳就是 SessionTools.resolve，它连接模型 tool schema、具体工具执行、权限系统、plugin hook 和 tool result 回填。
